properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v2 v4 v2 v2 v5 v6 v2 v7 v5 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: When You move, darkness runs for cover When You move, no one's turned away Because where You are, fear turns into praises And where You are, no heart's left unchanged

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: So come move, let justice roll on like a river Let worship turn into revival Lord, lead us back to You

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: When You move, the outcast finds a family When You move, the orphan finds a home Lord, here we are, oh, teach us to love mercy With humble hearts, we bow down at Your throne Jesus, oh-ooh-oooh

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: King of all generations Let every tongue and nation Surrender all to You alone, Jesus King of all generations Let every tongue and nation Surrender all to You alone, oh, You alone

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Oh, so come move, let justice roll on like a river Let worship turn into revival Lord, lead us back to You

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: King of all generations Let every tongue and nation Surrender all to You alone, You alone King of all generations Let every tongue and nation Surrender all to You alone

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Back to You, Jesus Back to You Back to our first love Back to our first love Jesus, Jesus
